# The Historical Record of the Future Requires Consentful Loops

Subtitle: `Digital provenance is incomplete unless it preserves the consent conditions under which a trace became admissible.`

## Description / Excerpt

A HowConsentWorks essay arguing that digital provenance requires consentful loop lineage: hashes preserve content integrity, but loops preserve consent integrity across witness, revocation, closure, lineage, and future admissibility.

Excerpt:

## I. The Problem With Provenance Without Consent Digital civilization is producing traces faster than human institutions can interpret them. A file is created. A message is sent. A photo is taken. A model is trained. A signature is attached. A timestamp is recorded. A hash is st

## Working Read

This is the strongest provenance essay because it insists that admissibility depends on consentful loop lineage, not just content integrity. It gives provenance a practical account of how traces stay valid across witness, revocation, closure, and reuse.

## Core Claim

Provenance is incomplete unless it preserves the consent conditions under which a trace became admissible.
